prompt: Complete using will or shall and the verbs in the box: be, come, find, have, lend, live, take, visit. You may have to use some negative forms.
explanation: Facts and predictions use will (will visit, will find, will live, won't be). A request uses Will you...? (Will you lend). A decision made now uses will (I'll have). An offer uses will (I'll take). An offer that is a question with we uses Shall we...? (Shall we come).
